title: Streamlit: Building Interactive ML Dashboards
content:
### Day 210: Streamlit: Building Interactive ML Dashboards

**Streamlit:** Build ML dashboards in pure Python.
- No HTML/CSS/JS needed
- `st.title()`, `st.slider()`, `st.plotly_chart()`
- Run: `streamlit run app.py`
- Deploy free on Streamlit Community Cloud
codeExample:
# Day 210: Streamlit: Building Interactive ML Dashboards
# Streamlit Dashboard
try:
    import streamlit as st
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np

    st.title("ML Model Dashboard")
    st.sidebar.header("Parameters")

    n_samples = st.sidebar.slider("Samples", 50, 500, 200)
    noise = st.sidebar.slider("Noise", 0.0, 1.0, 0.3)

    data = pd.DataFrame({
        'x': np.random.randn(n_samples),
        'y': np.random.randn(n_samples) * noise
    })

    col1, col2 = st.columns(2)
    col1.metric("Mean X", f"{data['x'].mean():.3f}")
    col2.metric("Std X", f"{data['x'].std():.3f}")

    st.line_chart(data)
    st.dataframe(data.describe())
except ImportError:
    print("Install: pip install streamlit")
    print("Run: streamlit run app.py")
